vllm.title: Fix tie_word_embeddings for Qwen2.
vllm.author: fyabc
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Current Qwen2 implementation has some problems when loading Qwen2 checkpoints with tie_word_embeddings=True (e.g. Qwen/Qwen1.5-0.5B-Chat and Qwen/Qwen1.5-0.5B-Chat-GPTQ-Int4). This PR fix it.

vllm.title: [Fix] Add args for mTLS support
vllm.author: declark1
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Missed adding these args to entrypoints/openai/api_server.py in previous PR #3410. Also updated default value for --ssl-cert-reqs to int(ssl.CERT_NONE) to align with uvicorn.

vllm.title: Fixes the misuse/mixuse of time.time()/time.monotonic()
vllm.author: sighingnow
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
I have noticed that there's some mixuse of time.time() and time.monotonic(), however, these two function cannot be used to subtract to compute the duration, e.g., self.metrics.time_in_queue = time - self.metrics.arrival_time.
The time.time() is preferred as it denotes the timepoint of events, e.g.,

vllm.title: [Misc] add error message in non linux platform
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
It is documented that vLLM only supports Linux. However, people in Windows or MacOS can run the installation process, and end with an irrelevant error "nvcc_cuda_version is not defined" (see #3425 ).
This PR prints a better message for them to understand that vLLM only supports linux.

vllm.title: Fix issue templates
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The tagging of newly created issues wasn't working and this PR partially fixes it.

vllm.title: Asynchronous tokenization
vllm.author: Yard1
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Currently, vLLM tokenizes incoming requests synchronously inside the Engine. This has a detrimental effect for serving with AsyncLLMEngine as tokenization of long prompts will block the event loop, causing both token generation and request handling to slow down, especially in high QPS scenarios.
Thi

vllm.title: Fixes the incorrect argument in the prefix-prefill test cases
vllm.author: sighingnow

vllm.title: Replace `lstrip()` with `removeprefix()` to fix Ruff linter warning
vllm.author: ronensc
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR fixes the Ruff linter warning:
B005 Using `.strip()` with multi-character strings is misleading

I believe the intent of data.decode("utf-8").lstrip("data:") was to remove the prefix data:. However, lstrip() removes any combination of characters (a, d, t, :) from the beginning of the string.

vllm.title: Fix Baichuan chat template
vllm.author: Dinghow
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The previous template_baichuan.jinja generates extra \n compared with official implementation.
Given the input messages is
[
    {'role': 'user', 'content': 'Hello, who are you'},
    {'role': 'assistant', 'content': 'I am a large language model from Baichuan Inc'},
    {'role': 'user', 'content': "
